description:
Design and implement the optional Cove app protocol for Foxy Mode v4.

**Status:** Design approved. Implementation deferred until at least one Cove app is ready to adopt the protocol.

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-12-foxy-mode-v4-cove-app-protocol-design.md`

**Summary:**
- Linux-only Unix domain socket transport (v4 scope).
- Per-launch socket at `$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/cove-nexus/<runId>.sock` (fallback: mkdtemp).
- Nexus injects `COVE_NEXUS`, `COVE_NEXUS_PROTOCOL_VERSION`, `COVE_NEXUS_TOOL_SLUG`, `COVE_NEXUS_RUN_ID`, `COVE_NEXUS_APP_NAME`, `COVE_NEXUS_SOCKET` into spawned app env.
- App → Nexus one-way NDJSON messages: `app_ready`, `status_update`, `active_document`, `progress_update`, `notification`, `app_exiting`.
- Protocol state stored in `processRegistry[slug].protocol`; broadcast via existing `cove:process:update` IPC.
- Non-protocol apps unchanged (v2 behavior).

**Out of scope:** macOS, Windows named pipes, file-based fallback, bidirectional messaging, embedding, reparenting.
title: Foxy Mode v4 — optional Cove app protocol design
